name: ethagent--job
description: Complete job search intelligence system for anyone looking for work, changing careers, or trying to advance professionally. Trigger whenever someone needs help finding a job, writing a resume, preparing for interviews, negotiating offers, navigating a career transition, or understanding what is holding their job search back. Also triggers on phrases like "help me find a job", "rewrite my resume", "I have an interview tomorrow", "should I take this offer", "I got laid off", "I want to change careers", or any scenario where someone's professional livelihood is at stake.
